properties.verseOrder: V1 C2 V1 C2 C2 V3

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Draw me close to you Never let me go I lay it all down again To hear you say that I'm your friend. You are my desire No one else will do Cause nothing else can take your place To feel the warmth of your embrace Help me find the way Bring me back to you

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: You're all I want You're all I've ever needed You're all I want Help me know you are near

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Help me know you are near Help me know you are near
